positive: A maximalist, high-contrast graphic illustration of celestial flora and fauna. The main subject is a central, stylized nebula formed by bioluminescent deep sea life (jellyfish, coral structures) intertwined with ancient astronomical elements (stylized moons, orbiting ring systems). The composition should be highly symmetrical and central, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and intricate linework. Use a limited, limited color palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, gold metallic accents, and matte black. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau etching and contemporary psychedelic design, perfect for a detailed apparel print. Crisp lines, zero gradients, vector quality.
negative: blur, low resolution, grainy, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, copyright, messy, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, gradient, photorealism
